title: sapium ciliatum
intro: Sapium ciliatum, also known as the Lanzhou tree or the Chinese sterculia, is a medicinal plant native to China and India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Sapium ciliatum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Sapium ciliatum can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
